title: Scheelea parviflora
taxonomy: Scheelea parviflora is classified within the plant family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. This plant is native to South America and is a type of palm tree. Scheelea parviflora is further classified within the genus Scheelea, which consists of several species of palms. The species name 'parviflora' is derived from the Latin words 'parvus,' meaning small, and 'flos,' meaning flower, indicating the small flowers of this plant. Scheelea parviflora is also known to be a relatively rare species within its genus.
